File ends at line 105 with no gold_set key present anywhere.
search_files for 'gold_set' in src/rebar/llm/eval_specs returned hits for 20 other files but none for the three target files.

findings.criterion: Each of the three specs has a non-empty gold_set; each entry has an input and a label (finding|pass).
findings.detail: None of the three target files contain a gold_set key. A search for 'gold_set' across all eval specs returns hits for 20 other files but zero hits for plan-review-asserted-capability.eval.yaml, plan-review-decomp-shape.eval.yaml, or plan-review-necessity.eval.yaml. Reading each file in full confirms they end after the dataset block with no gold_set section.
findings.remediation: Add a non-empty gold_set list to each of the three YAML files, with at least one finding-labeled and one pass-labeled entry per file, following the pattern in plan-review-container.eval.yaml.

citations.description: Confirmed by full file reads of all three YAML files — no gold_set section present.

findings.criterion: Each gold_set is balanced (>=1 finding and >=1 pass gold label), faithful to that spec's dataset.
findings.detail: No gold_set exists in any of the three files, so the balance requirement cannot be met. This is a sub-part of the same missing implementation.

findings.criterion: validate_eval_spec(spec, strict=True) returns no errors for all dataset-bearing packaged specs.
findings.detail: eval.py lines 265-267 show that validate_eval_spec(strict=True) appends 'strict: eval spec needs a non-empty gold_set (judge kappa alignment)' when spec.get('gold_set') is not a non-empty list. Since none of the three files have gold_set, all three would still fail strict validation.

citations.description: All three YAML files confirmed to lack gold_set; strict validation code at eval.py:265-267 would emit errors for each.

findings.criterion: The offline eval-discipline test suite passes; the Prompt Eval action is green.
findings.detail: This is an operator-attested criterion (untagged, so treated as codebase-verifiable). Because the gold_set is absent from all three specs and strict validation would still fail, the CI gate would still be red. The ticket comment's claim of a green Prompt Eval action run (29678395138) is not substantiated by the actual repository state.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
